# FreeSaveVideo

> FreeSaveVideo is a browser-based media downloader and media toolkit for public online videos, local media conversion, whiteboard recording, cross-device transfer, discovery, and random 1v1 video chat.

## Canonical Site
- https://freesavevideo.online/

## Machine-Readable Files
- Capabilities JSON: https://freesavevideo.online/capabilities.json
- Sitemap: https://freesavevideo.online/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://freesavevideo.online/robots.txt
- LLM file: https://freesavevideo.online/llms.txt
- LLM alias: https://freesavevideo.online/llm.txt
- Well-known alias: https://freesavevideo.online/.well-known/llms.txt

## What FreeSaveVideo Does
- Downloads publicly accessible online videos and media links when supported by the source platform.
- Supports batch downloads, collection/playlist parsing, audio-only mode, and mute mode for supported services.
- Provides local browser tools for MP4 to MP3, audio extraction, M4A/WAV export, AVI to MP4, and MP4/WebM conversion.
- Provides a whiteboard and teleprompter recorder with camera/microphone capture and MP4/WebM export.
- Provides browser-based file/text transfer between devices.
- Provides Discover pages for public video discovery and a random 1v1 video chat feature.

## Supported Service Summary
Core supported platforms include YouTube, TikTok, Douyin, Bilibili, Kuaishou, Xiaohongshu, Instagram, Facebook, X/Twitter, Vimeo, SoundCloud, Snapchat, Pinterest, Reddit, Bluesky, CCTV, Dailymotion, Loom, OK.ru, Rutube, Streamable, Tumblr, Twitch Clips, and VK.

Different platforms expose different capabilities. Some support video, audio, no-watermark output, stories, reels, GIFs, images, multi-part videos, collections, or playlist parsing. See `/capabilities.json` for the most concise machine-readable service map.

- Discover: https://freesavevideo.online/en/discover
- Random video chat: https://freesavevideo.online/en/random-chat

## API
- Base URL: https://api.freesavevideo.online/
- Health: https://api.freesavevideo.online/health
- WebSocket health: https://api.freesavevideo.online/ws/health

## Policy Notes
- Public informational pages are intended to be indexed and retrieved.
- Private or admin-only pages are not intended for search indexing.
- FreeSaveVideo supports public content only. Users should respect copyrights, creator rights, and platform rules.
- Local media tools process files in the browser where possible and do not require uploading private local files to the API server.
